name: Extra block menus
description: Adds more options to the "point towards ()" and "switch costume to ()" block. These will work for everyone using the project.

latestUpdate.temporaryNotice: New "previous costume" option in the "switch costume to ()" block.

settings.name: Switch costume to (previous costume)
settings.description: Adds a "previous costume" option in the "switch costume to ()" block that makes the sprite go back a costume.

settings.name: Point towards (random direction)
settings.description: Adds a "random direction" option to the "point towards ()" block that makes the sprite point in a random direction.
